programmes.show_description: Relax, unwind and chill out with an hour of classic and contemporary tunes.
See listings for BBC Radio 5 Live on BBC Sounds.
The latest news from Wales and the world.
A lively mix of music to start the day. Perfect for your pod!
James Williams is in Cardigan, part of the new Ceredigion Penfro constituency, to talk to local people about the issues that matter most to them ahead of the Senedd election.
Everything you need to know as you wake up.
Justine brightens your morning with great music and entertainment. Call 03700 100 110 Text 81012 or message via X @bbcradiowales.
Be part of the nation's conversation.
Celebrity guests, the latest blockbuster film reviews, and we play The Name Game! Call or WhatsApp 03700 100 110 Text 81012.
Everything you need to know as you head home.
Rebecca Evans champions the spoken and written words of Richard Burton and the literary ambitions of Pontrhydyfen's favourite son.
Elin Fflur has all 1970s anthems, including a girl bands vs boy Bands power mix, great hits, and a Welsh language track from Heather Jones.
Elin Fflur gets your weekend started with 80s classics, a ghoulish movie soundtrack and some Geraint Jarman.
Elin Fflur hits play on her 90s Long Player, My Boo, party classics and drops some Badumdum from Hanner Pei.
H from Steps takes you into the weekend with great music and chat.
H from Steps has your ultimate party playlist. Not just for Fridays!
See listings for BBC Radio 5 Live on BBC Sounds.
Everything you need to know as you wake up.
Your dedications and song requests from the 1950s-90s. Can you guess the Stuck in the Middle song? Text 81012, email moneyfornothing@bbc.co.uk or call 03700 100 110.
Lucy Owen brings great music and guests to your Saturday.
Live commentary, guests and analysis. Your home for Welsh sport.
Top tunes, classic and new, for your Saturday night. Plus the Wales Mix.
Adam chats to Art School Girlfriend about her new album, Lean In. We dive into the vault to uncover an interview with Slash from Guns N' Roses, plus the best in new Welsh music.
